document.title: Mini NanoBlade Flex Dual-Band Flexible Planar Antenna 2400-2500 MHz/4900-5875 MHz

sourceSummary.oneLine: Ezurio datasheet for the Mini NanoBlade Flex dual-band flexible planar antenna covering 2400-2500 MHz and 4900-5875 MHz.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Use as manufacturer component specification evidence for antenna configuration, electrical ratings, mechanical dimensions, connector options, and RoHS compliance.
keyPoints: The antenna supports WLAN applications and is designed to be embedded inside devices.
Frequency coverage is listed as 2400-2500 MHz and 4900-5875 MHz.
Hazardous materials compliance is listed as RoHS Compliant (2011/65/EU).
Part number MAF95310 is configured with a 185 mm x 1.13 mm cable, IPEX U.FL connector, and connector orientation A.

concepts.name: Flexible PCB antenna mounting
concepts.evidence: Flexible PCB for mounting in curved housing

concepts.name: Embedded antenna integration
concepts.evidence: The antennas are specifically designed to be embedded inside devices for aesthetically pleasing integration.

concepts.name: WLAN antenna application
concepts.evidence: The Ezurio Mini NanoBlade Flex antenna features a flexible printed circuit board that supports WLAN applications.

evidence.claim: The document identifies the product as Mini NanoBlade Flex, a dual-band flexible planar antenna.
evidence.evidenceText: Mini NanoBlade Flex Dual-Band Flexible Planar Antenna

evidence.claim: The antenna operates over 2400-2500 MHz and 4900-5875 MHz frequency ranges.

evidence.evidenceText: The Ezurio Mini NanoBlade Flex antenna features a flexible printed circuit board that supports WLAN applications.

evidence.claim: The antenna is intended for embedded use inside devices, including space-sensitive applications with curved housings.
evidence.evidenceText: The flexible board can be embedded in space-sensitive applications where a curved housing does not provide a flat surface for antenna mounting. The antennas are specifically designed to be embedded inside devices for aesthetically pleasing integration.

evidence.claim: The antenna is listed as RoHS compliant under 2011/65/EU.
The MAF95310 configuration uses a 185 mm by 1.13 mm cable with an IPEX U.FL connector and orientation A.
evidence.evidenceText: MAF95310 185 mm (7.28 in.) x 1.13 mm (0.044 in.) IPEX U.FL A

evidence.claim: The antenna dimensions are 36 x 12 x 0.1 mm.
evidence.evidenceText: Dimensions – mm (in.) 36 x 12 x 0.1 (1.42 x 0.47 x 0.004)

evidence.claim: The maximum peak gain is listed as 2.8 dBi for 2400-2500 MHz and 3.4 dBi for 4900-5875 MHz.
Ezurio provides headquarters and support contact information for the product.
evidence.evidenceText: Headquarters Ezurio 50 S. Main St. Suite 1100 Akron, OH 44308 USA Website http://www.ezurio.com Technical Support http://www.ezurio.com/resources/support
